reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 FP gates passed. Gate 1 (Dead Code): Function has active caller at rpc.go:54 (RPC handler registration). Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): Entry point is P2P network (UNTRUSTED per trust_assumptions). Gate 3 (Scope): In-scope PeerDAS issue (EIP-7594). Confirmed spec deviation: data columns saved to storage (receive_data_column.go:19) asynchronously before ReceiveBlock validation completes (subscriber_beacon_blocks.go:40,42). However, exploitability depends on race window timing between async goroutine save and block validation failure. Marked as CONFIRMED_POTENTIAL due to narrow race window and uncertain real-world impact.
